items.title: Individual productivity
items.description: Drafting email, learning explanations, personal planning, and writing assistance for solo knowledge workers.

items.title: Document synthesis
items.description: Summaries, meeting notes, and action-item extraction from reports, transcripts, and long threads.

items.title: Software development assist
items.description: Code explanation, test scaffolding, incident log triage, and API prototyping alongside CI and human review.

items.title: Customer support augmentation
items.description: FAQ answering from curated knowledge, ticket draft suggestions, and multilingual reply assistance with agent approval.

items.title: Research and analysis narratives
items.description: Comparing options, drafting insight memos from pasted data, and explaining charts—analysts verify numbers.

items.title: Creative and content production
items.description: Brainstorming campaigns, outlines, and structured content batches with brand and legal review.
